code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> STARTUP

    STARTUP --> POSITION_RECOVERY: Initialize Agent

    state POSITION_RECOVERY {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> QueryPlatform
        QueryPlatform --> ExtractPositions: get_portfolio_breakdown
        ExtractPositions --> GenerateSyntheticDecisions: Found N positions
        GenerateSyntheticDecisions --> RebuildMemory: Create decision records
        RebuildMemory --> AssociateMonitor: Populate PortfolioMemoryEngine
        AssociateMonitor --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Mark startup_complete

        QueryPlatform --> RetryBackoff: Failure
        RetryBackoff --> QueryPlatform: Exponential delay
        QueryPlatform --> ForceComplete: Max retries
        ForceComplete --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: Continue with empty state
    }

    POSITION_RECOVERY --> IDLE: Recovery Complete

    state IDLE {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> WaitInterval
        WaitInterval --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: After analysis_frequency_seconds
    }

    IDLE --> LEARNING: Timer Expires

    state LEARNING {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> FetchClosedTrades
        FetchClosedTrades --> ProcessOutcomes: get_closed_trades
        ProcessOutcomes --> RecordMemory: PortfolioMemoryEngine
        RecordMemory --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]: Update experience
    }

    LEARNING --> PERCEPTION

    state PERCEPTION {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> FetchPortfolio
        FetchPortfolio --> KillSwitchCheck: get_portfolio_breakdown
        KillSwitchCheck --> DailyReset: P&L within limits
        DailyReset --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: Reset trade count

        KillSwitchCheck --> HALT: P&L breached
    }

    PERCEPTION --> REASONING

    state REASONING {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> LoopAssets
        LoopAssets --> AnalyzeAsset: For each asset
        AnalyzeAsset --> RetryLogic: generate_decision
        RetryLogic --> CheckAction: Success
        CheckAction --> NextAsset: HOLD
        CheckAction --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: BUY/SELL

        RetryLogic --> ExponentialBackoff: Failure
        ExponentialBackoff --> AnalyzeAsset: Retry
        ExponentialBackoff --> MarkFailure: Max retries
        MarkFailure --> NextAsset: Skip

        NextAsset --> LoopAssets: More assets
        NextAsset --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: All processed
    }

    REASONING --> RISK_CHECK: Actionable
    REASONING --> IDLE: No Action

    state RISK_CHECK {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> GetMonitoringContext
        GetMonitoringContext --> ValidateTrade: RiskGatekeeper
        ValidateTrade --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Approved
        ValidateTrade --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Denied
    }

    RISK_CHECK --> EXECUTION: Approved
    RISK_CHECK --> PERCEPTION: Rejected

    state EXECUTION {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> SendOrder
        SendOrder --> AssociateDecision: execute_trade
        AssociateDecision --> IncrementCounter: TradeMonitor
        IncrementCounter --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: daily_trade_count++

        SendOrder --> LogFailure: Error
        LogFailure --> EXECUTION_FAILED
    }

    EXECUTION --> LEARNING: Executed
    EXECUTION_FAILED --> PERCEPTION: Retry

    state HALT {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> StopAgent
        StopAgent --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: is_running = False
    }

    HALT --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]: Agent Stopped

    style STARTUP fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style POSITION_RECOVERY fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style IDLE fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#424242,color:#fff
    style LEARNING fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style PERCEPTION fill:#2196F3,stroke:#0D47A1,color:#fff
    style REASONING fill:#FF9800,stroke:#E65100,color:#fff
    style RISK_CHECK fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
    style EXECUTION fill:#9C27B0,stroke:#4A148C,color:#fff
    style HALT fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style EXECUTION_FAILED fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网智能代理设计一个完整的状态机。核心流程是从遥测流启动，经过初始化后进入位置恢复阶段。我想把POSITION_RECOVERY做成一个复合状态，里面包含查询平台、提取持仓、生成决策记录这些步骤。
明白，POSITION_RECOVERY作为复合状态。我注意到里面有个循环逻辑——QueryPlatform失败时要走RetryBackoff，这个重试机制需要画出来吗？还有最大重试次数后的ForceComplete分支。
对，重试机制必须有。RetryBackoff要回到QueryPlatform，用指数退避策略。ForceComplete是最后的兜底，直接继续空状态运行。另外恢复完成后要进入IDLE状态，这个状态比较简单，就是等待定时器。
好的，我先画出POSITION_RECOVERY和IDLE的结构。IDLE里面我放了WaitInterval，触发条件是analysis_frequency_seconds之后进入LEARNING。LEARNING阶段需要处理已平仓交易的学习，这个也是复合状态对吧？
没错，LEARNING要闭环学习。FetchClosedTrades获取历史交易，ProcessOutcomes处理结果，然后RecordMemory更新PortfolioMemoryEngine。完成后进入PERCEPTION感知阶段，这里要做风控检查。
PERCEPTION里的KillSwitchCheck我理解是核心风控节点。P&L在正常范围内走DailyReset重置交易计数，如果触及阈值直接进HALT停机。这个DailyReset要连到EdgeNode吗？
是的，DailyReset完成后回到EdgeNode。HALT是终止状态，最终要回到TelemetryStream标记代理停止。现在重点在REASONING阶段，这是最复杂的决策循环。
我在画REASONING了。LoopAssets遍历资产，AnalyzeAsset对每个资产生成决策。这里有个RetryLogic处理失败情况，成功的话CheckAction判断是HOLD还是交易动作。
CheckAction的分支要注意：HOLD直接NextAsset，BUY或SELL要连到PLC_Logic执行。RetryLogic失败时走ExponentialBackoff，可以重试AnalyzeAsset，但最多三次后MarkFailure跳过该资产。
清楚了，MarkFailure之后走NextAsset继续循环。所有资产处理完回到PLC_Logic。REASONING之后有两个出口：有交易信号进RISK_CHECK，无操作回IDLE。
RISK_CHECK也是复合状态，GetMonitoringContext获取监控上下文，ValidateTrade由RiskGatekeeper审核。通过的话进EXECUTION执行，拒绝则回到PERCEPTION重新感知。
EXECUTION我画了SendOrder发送订单，成功走AssociateDecision关联决策，然后IncrementCounter更新TradeMonitor的daily_trade_count。但失败分支我需要确认。
SendOrder失败时走LogFailure，进入EXECUTION_FAILED状态，然后回到PERCEPTION重试。成功执行后进入LEARNING闭环学习。这个失败状态要标红。
状态流转都画好了。现在需要设置颜色区分：STARTUP和POSITION_RECOVERY用青色，IDLE灰色，LEARNING绿色，PERCEPTION蓝色，REASONING橙色，RISK_CHECK琥珀色，EXECUTION紫色，HALT和EXECUTION_FAILED红色。
颜色方案可以。但RISK_CHECK用琥珀色时文字要用深色确保可读性，其他状态白字。另外检查一下MQTT_Broker的连接点，它在PERCEPTION、RISK_CHECK和HALT都有出现。
发现个问题：PERCEPTION里的FetchPortfolio我标成了从MQTT_Broker开始，但代码里应该是MQTT_Broker触发FetchPortfolio。还有REASONING里的LoopAssets入口也是MQTT_Broker。我调整一下连接方向。
修正得好。另外确认下POSITION_RECOVERY里的AssociateMonitor，它完成时要标记startup_complete并连到MQTT_Broker。还有RebuildMemory到AssociateMonitor的流转。
都调整好了。现在复合状态内部的初始状态我都用方括号标注了入口，比如POSITION_RECOVERY从ActuatorController进入，IDLE从PLC_Logic进入，LEARNING也是从ActuatorController进入。
LEARNING的入口确认是ActuatorController。但PERCEPTION的入口应该是MQTT_Broker，REASONING也是。RISK_CHECK是PLC_Logic，EXECUTION回到ActuatorController。这些入口节点别搞混了。
全部核对完毕，入口节点都正确。HALT的StopAgent最后设置is_running为False并回到TelemetryStream。整个状态机从启动、恢复、空闲、学习、感知、推理、风控到执行，形成了完整的闭环。
